corpus_source: agent-captains-reflections-* (Elasticsearch), field `proposed_change`, excluding eval_mode: true docs
query_description: 35 real proposals selected as same-idea clusters (fast-path/reduce-LLM-calls, capture_write_failed retry/alert, ES retry/backoff, ux clarification-gate, ux tool-visibility) plus same-category-and-topical-family hard-negative singletons (verify-before-acting, add-telemetry-for-X, skip-work-for-trivial-input families); see pairs.yaml notes for per-pair provenance.
